CustomField.description: as Interaction Type Pick list changes, this formula field must also be updated to account for new pick list values
CustomField.formula:
IF(
OR(Contact_Requested__c,
Demo_Requested__c,
Quote_Requested__c
),
"QL Hot",
CASE( TEXT( Interaction_Type__c ) ,
"Accelerator Form", "QL Hot",
"Ad-hoc Hot Form", "QL Hot",
"GROW", "QL Hot",
"List Upload", IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL"),
"Progressive Form", IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL"),
"Trial", IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL"),
"Webinar", IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL"),
"icapture", IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL"),
IF( TEXT( Accelerator__c ) = "TRUE" , "QL Hot", "Pre-QL") ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: formula to determine the qual status...uses interaction type + accelerator
CustomField.label: Qualification Status
